name: Vedhin Govind
summary: Highly motivated Computer Science student with a strong foundation in full-stack web development, data structures, and algorithms. Possesses hands-on experience in building scalable applications using the MERN stack, Java, and Python, demonstrated through projects like an AI-powered news aggregator and a comprehensive hotel management portal. Proven leadership and mentorship skills from spearheading technical workshops for over 700 students and guiding peers in programming fundamentals.

projects.title: Hotel Management Portal
bullets: Architected a full-stack hotel management system with secure authentication, serving 100+ listings and 500+ user reviews.
Engineered robust MongoDB schemas and RESTful APIs with middleware validation, ensuring 99% uptime.
Optimized database queries and implemented caching, improving application response time by 35%.

projects.title: Business Digest – AI-Powered Briefing Engine
bullets: Developed an AI-powered news aggregation platform integrating Groq LLM and GNews API for personalized business insights.
Implemented secure backend infrastructure with Node.js, MongoDB, and OAuth authentication via Passport.js for 500+ users.
Designed scalable RESTful APIs to support a React + TypeScript frontend, enabling real-time competitor analysis.

projects.title: Community Crop Exchange Platform
bullets: Engineered a collaborative agricultural platform connecting 200+ farmers, reducing crop wastage by 40%.
Implemented a WebSocket-based real-time communication system, accelerating trade negotiations by 60%.
Developed location-aware filtering algorithms and secure authentication to streamline resource discovery.
Spearheaded technical initiatives, orchestrating 10+ workshops and hackathons that enhanced web development skills for 700+ students.
Forged strategic partnerships with industry professionals and faculty to secure mentorship and project opportunities for club members.
Mentored 40+ first-year students in C programming fundamentals, developing a curriculum that improved coding proficiency by 85%.
